description: Contact form message submission and admin management

endpoints.name: Submit Contact Message
endpoints.description: Submit a contact form message from the storefront

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when visitor fills out and submits the contact form with name, email, subject, and message

message.example: Do you have wireless headphones in stock?

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Shows success toast 'Your message has been sent', clears form fields

endpoints.name: Get All Messages (Admin)

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays all contact messages in admin table with sender name, email, subject, read status, and date

message.example: Do you have headphones in stock?

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Messages table with unread indicator (bold/dot), sender info, subject preview, date, click to expand full message

endpoints.name: Mark Message As Read
endpoints.description: Mark a contact message as read

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Called when admin opens/clicks on an unread message

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Removes unread indicator from message row, changes styling from bold to normal
